category_sources: source_facts.description lists Git utilities; official GitHub repository describes git-plus as Git utilities and documents git multi usage.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is git-plus; official GitHub repository title is tkrajina/git-plus.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the best official documentation surface found and documents commands such as git multi.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub source-control project URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description lists git multi, git relation, git old-branches, and git recent; official README documents running git commands across multiple repositories.
